name: pledequant_startupq
description: TOKEN-FREE serve-path variant of int4-mtp-bi0-int4head-pledequant (PR #817). Identical to the shipped pledequant submission EXCEPT the target model source: instead of pulling the PRIVATE pre-built Hub repo (which 401'd on the token-less HF runner), serve.py quantizes the PUBLIC base google/gemma-4-E4B-it-qat-w4a16-ct lm_head to int4 g32 AND de-quantizes the 42 per_layer_input_gate to bf16 (--dequant-ple) at startup via build_lmhead_quant.py. The built checkpoint is byte-identical to validated #805 (proven sha cdeedf04), so PPL/greedy/modalities are unchanged; only the source + auth requirement change. LOCAL VALIDATION ONLY -- no HF job.
